governing_requirement: Publish the final verified MaskFactory release plus Main adoption and reciprocal handoff receipts, regenerate all tracker reports and close only core_autonomous_runtime when both projects pin the same actual runtime hashes and every exact core gate passes while optional profiles retain independent status.

dependency_state.disposition: MF-P6-12.06 remains dependency and final-release blocked. Claim firewall, preserved lineage, hydration and tracker reporting receive partial credit; no runtime release or adoption receipt may be issued.

verified_foundations: The completion registry freezes exactly core_autonomous_runtime, independent_real_accuracy and scale_daz_maturity with independent status computation and a transitive firewall against mandatory human/scale dependencies in core.
MF-P6-07.07 is complete and negative claim fixtures prevent operational evidence from claiming independent real accuracy or optional-profile failure from revoking core.
The cross-project session handoff pins exact task IDs, repositories, worktrees, PRs, immutable producer lineage, consumer head, 12 frozen schemas, preservation seal and reconciliation seal.
The runtime implementation handoff truthfully records producer_runtime_complete=false, consumer_runtime_complete=false, end_to_end_release_complete=false and currency_review_policy_status=fail.
Planning preservation and reconciliation manifests are hash-bound and tested, and a fresh session can recover current planning/contract state without conversational memory.
Eleven focused tracker/profile/handoff/claim-firewall tests pass, Ruff reports no issues and tracker validation reports 798 non-orphaned items with no structural problems.

focused_validation.pytest_scope: completion profile registry/status/dependency firewall, dashboard profile separation, session handoff, planning manifest, runtime handoff, superseding decision, bridge claim firewall, and current live tracker incomplete-bundle refusal

confirmed_gaps: MF-P6-12.05 has not executed or signed the production cross-project qualification matrix.
No final producer release snapshot/package/certificate/capability/journal/rollback identity exists for the current implementation head.
No Main runtime adoption receipt pins an actual installed producer release, adapter/controller/App commit, compatibility result and vertical-slice evidence.
No reciprocal producer acknowledgement binds the Main adoption receipt, current invalidation head and rollback target.
The existing PR/handoff identities are planning/contract preservation evidence and explicitly carry no runtime release authority.
The signed currency review policy remains failed on missing live benchmark certificates and distinct tested rollback evidence.
Core has 43 open driving items and 24 unresolved hard blockers project-wide; closing core or publishing final success would be false.

finalization_packet.reason: Final release acceptance, Git/GitHub publication, tracker closure and cross-task acknowledgement remain Codex-owned. Underlying missing runtime implementations retain their separate prepared worker scopes.
required_inputs: accepted MF-P6-12.05 signed production qualification bundle
exact Main compatibility/adoption receipt and installed runtime identities
matching producer and consumer commits plus frozen contract/reconciliation hashes
current unrevoked authority and currency policy evidence
fresh tracker/profile computation showing core_autonomous_runtime met
required_actions_when_unblocked: Independently reverify every referenced byte and signature in both repositories.
Publish the producer release and immutable handoff receipt without rewriting frozen v1 contracts.
Receive and verify Main's authenticated adoption receipt, then publish reciprocal acknowledgement.
Regenerate tracker dashboard/phase reports and close only core_autonomous_runtime if its recomputed dependency closure is met.
Leave independent_real_accuracy and scale_daz_maturity statuses unchanged unless their own evidence separately passes.
Commit, push and send a durable cross-task handoff containing exact release/adoption/rollback/invalidation hashes.

claim_boundary: This audit credits claim separation, preserved exact contract lineage, hydration manifests and truthful tracker reporting only. It does not publish a final producer release, issue or verify a Main runtime adoption receipt, pass MF-P6-12.05, close core_autonomous_runtime, change optional profiles, or complete MF-P6-12.06.
